name:
I'm west of lake on a small secluded ledge
on volcano's wall
description:
I'm west of lake on a small secluded ledge
on volcano's wall
hints: A precarious ledge on the volcano's inner wall, west of the lake. A narrow crevice is visible.
DO NOT SLEEP here - it's fatal! The crevice leads somewhere important.
GO CREV to squeeze through the narrow crevice. E swims back to the lake. SLEE = death (you fall off the ledge).
E=lake (12). GO CREV=deeper area. SLEE=DEATH. Also reachable via JUMP from sandy cliff (32).
notes: Ledge on volcano wall west of lake. E=lake (12). GO CREV goes deeper. SLEE=DEATH (fall off ledge). Narrow crevice is key passage.
